overview: Proyecto Soberanía is a decentralized AI training protocol interface on the Internet Computer. It enables launching, monitoring, and managing fine-tuning tasks for large language models using the EGGROLL evolutionary optimization strategy — no centralized hardware required.
features: Launch fine-tuning tasks with EGGROLL hyperparameters and artifact CID references
Live protocol dashboard showing generation number, active workers, and pending tasks
Task detail view with generation progress, worker ELO scores, and fitness metrics
Workers registry with reputation scores, status, and slashing history
Artifact explorer with on-chain hash verification for models and datasets
Retro console/terminal aesthetic with monospace fonts and CRT-style glow
